asset_name: Tesamorelin Pivotal Human Evidence Source Closure
status: SOURCE CLOSED WITHIN DEFINED SCOPE / LIVING EVIDENCE ACTIVE
evidence_type: Primary human efficacy and translation evidence
evidence_grade: B1 — pivotal or major randomised human evidence
controlled_conclusion: Two randomised placebo-controlled programmes in people with HIV and excess abdominal fat demonstrated reductions in visceral adipose tissue. The pivotal evidence is tied to protocol-defined tesamorelin material, populations, duration and clinical monitoring.

sources.title: Metabolic effects of a growth hormone-releasing factor in patients with HIV
Effects of tesamorelin in HIV-infected patients with abdominal fat accumulation
sources.type: Randomised controlled trial with safety extension

sources.title: Tesamorelin in people with HIV on integrase inhibitors

transfer_prohibited: Transfer from authorised finished product to catalogue supplier powder
Transfer from trial material to unverified supplier material
Creation of dosing, injection or reconstitution guidance
Assumption of supplier purity, potency, sterility, stability or equivalence
next_review_trigger: Material label, indication, safety, regulatory, trial, manufacturer, quality or supplier-evidence change
